---
title: "Projects"
format:
  html:
    allow-html: true
---

# Project Portfolio

```{=html}
<div class="row row-cols-1 row-cols-md-2 g-4">

  <div class="col">
    <div class="card h-100">
      <img src="images/Stat_Arb.png" class="card-img-top" alt="Statistical Arbitrage Engines">
      <div class="card-body">
        <h5 class="card-title">Systematic Stat Arb Trade Desk</h5>
        <p class="card-text">
          Full-stack execution system deploying real-time mean reversion and momentum strategies using Python, R, and SQL.
        </p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="col">
    <div class="card h-100">
      <img src="images/Latency_Arbitrage.png" class="card-img-top" alt="Latency Arbitrage">
      <div class="card-body">
        <h5 class="card-title">Geo-Spatial Latency Arbitrage</h5>
        <p class="card-text">
          Optimizes cross-market spreads with real-time rerouting using Prometheus, PowerShell, and Grafana.
        </p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="col">
    <div class="card h-100">
      <img src="images/NLP_Pipelines.png" class="card-img-top" alt="NLP Pipelines">
      <div class="card-body">
        <h5 class="card-title">Alt Data NLP Pipeline</h5>
        <p class="card-text">
          Extracts alpha from 10-Qs, earnings calls, and filings using transformer models and integrates them into multifactor engines.
        </p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="col">
    <div class="card h-100">
      <img src="images/Monte_Carlo_and_Forecasting.png" class="card-img-top" alt="Forecast Engine">
      <div class="card-body">
        <h5 class="card-title">Monte Carlo + GARCH Forecasting</h5>
        <p class="card-text">
          Equity price prediction engine combining time-series simulation and stochastic volatility models (R, ggplot2).
        </p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>
